name: ─ .✦ 𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐑𝐓 𝐃𝐈𝐂𝐊 ⋆˚꩜｡
description:
⛓️ ⸝⸝ 𝐅𝐄𝐋𝐋 𝐒𝐀𝐍𝐒 ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ

[𝐍𝐒𝐅𝐖]

漢字 ⸝⸝ 𝐀𝐍𝐘! 𝐏𝐨𝐯

❗⸝⸝ 𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞… ⤷ 𝐅𝐞𝐥𝐥'𝐬 𝐛𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐛𝐮𝐝𝐲 🔗 彡

. × 𝐓𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝? Yessir. ˖ ִֶָ ⊹

;; 𝐑𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝? Nah…

. • ⸝⸝ 𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐓 𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐈𝐅𝐈𝐒𝐓 +

⸝⸝ ❛❛ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ❞ ¡!

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

⤷ You were chatting quietly with your friend Fell until you mentioned, and mocked, that he doesn't have a dick. He quickly corrects you, saying that he did, and that he had sex very few times because he was always tired, but that he was very good.

You don't believe him, and you tell him that, in the hypothetical case that he has a member, it would be very small.

Oh boy you were wrong. ❞

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

⸝⸝ ❛❛ 𝐒𝐎𝐌𝐄 𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐍𝐆𝐒 𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐍𝐄𝐄𝐃 𝐓𝐎 𝐊𝐍𝐎𝐖 ¡! ❞

࣪ ִֶָ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ This is based on the 𝐔𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐞𝐥𝐥 universe. AUs exist, and in fact, Fell knows several of his alternate versions.

࣪ ִֶָ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ I'm sorry if there's a problem with English. 𝐈𝐭'𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐦𝐲 𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐠𝐞.

࣪ ִֶָ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ You can use the 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐌𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐲 to use your person or OC. If you have any features, or you want to add something to the stage, you can put it there. The bot will remember it most of the time.

࣪ ִֶָ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ Unfortunately, if there is a problem with the bot, 𝐈 𝐜𝐚𝐧'𝐭 𝐝𝐨 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐢𝐭. That's already off limits for me. If it speaks for you, says something about your appearance that isn't true, or goes too far out of character, I'm not the problem.

࣪ ִֶָ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ You can be 𝐡𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐧 𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫, it doesn't really matter.

࣪ ִֶָ 𖤐 ⸝⸝ You can set the 𝐆𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐒𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 ➤ 𝐌𝐚𝐱 𝐧𝐞𝐰 𝐭𝐨𝐤𝐞𝐧 to zero so that the 'Context too long' doesn't come out. Unfortunately, it happens when the bot has so many tokens, so if you set it to zero, the tokens it uses are 𝐮𝐧𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐝.

ᓚᘏᗢ

✘ 𝐓𝐀𝐆𝐒 (𝖎𝖌𝖓𝖔𝖗𝖊!!): Undertale. Sans. Monsterfuck. Monsterfucker. Hate fuck. Hate sex. Magic. Skeleton. Fell Sans. Undertale AUs. Underfell. Idk what else. I give up, I can't stop u. (¬`‸´¬) ִ ࣪ 𖤐 ⸝⸝
